scripts.build:internal: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile internal --platform all
scripts.build:internal:android: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile internal --platform android
scripts.build:internal:ios: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile internal --platform ios
scripts.build:production: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js all && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile production --platform all
scripts.build:production:android: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js android && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.build:production:ios: node scripts/check-eas-credits.js ios && npx expo-doctor && node scripts/bump-version.js && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.build:preview: npx expo-doctor && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:preview:fix: npx expo-doctor && eas build --profile preview --platform android -m "Firebase push registration fix"
